name: Canvas2D Maze
description: Reusable, config-driven top-down maze game: grid map with walls, continuous player movement with wall collision, collectibles, keys and locked doors, patrol/chase enemies, lives, score and level-complete on reaching the exit. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: rectangular grid maze from a string map ('#' wall, '.' floor)
continuous top-down movement with AABB wall collision
level complete on reaching the exit (optionally requires all collectibles)
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
no procedural maze generation in v1 — the map is JSON-defined
